signals.headline: South Korea BOK Holds Benchmark Rate at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea BOK Holds Benchmark Rate at 2.5% Amid Inflation Pressures from Iran Conflict (Apr 10, 2026)** | NO | HIGH confidence[5][6]
